title: cyperus cruentus subsp. amauropus
intro: Cyperus cruentus subsp. amauropus, also known as the blood sedge or red papyrus, is a type of sedge plant that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal effects. The health benefits of Cyperus cruentus subsp. amauropus include treating digestive issues, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory problems. The herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or topical creams, and it is often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being.
